name: Rogz Dog Utility Side Release Collar X-Small Blue
shortDescription: A durable blue Rogz X-Small Utility Dog Collar featuring reflective stitching, a secure RogLoc buckle, LLT safety design, and adjustable comfort perfect for small dogs and puppies.
description: Rogz Dog Utility Side Release Collar X-Small – Blue The Rogz Utility Side Release Collar X-Small is designed to give small dogs and puppies superior comfort, safety, and durability. Made from strong yet lightweight nylon webbing, this stylish blue collar is ideal for daily use, training, and nighttime walks. Key Features Reflective Stitching Reflective yarn is woven into the webbing to enhance visibility during nighttime or low-light walks, helping keep your dog safe and easy to spot. RogLoc Buckle The trusted “Fort Knox” of release buckles ensures secure fastening while remaining easy for you to open when needed. Low Load Technology (LLT) A strategically positioned load ring reduces pressure on the buckle, increasing safety and extending the collar’s lifespan. Comfortable Fit Contoured, rounded plastic components sit smoothly against your dog’s neck, preventing chafing and ensuring all-day comfort. Durable Construction Crafted from high-quality nylon webbing with an electroplated chrome die-cast ring that resists rust and wear, providing secure leash attachment. Adjustable Size Designed for small breeds and puppies, the collar adjusts to achieve a perfect, secure fit while allowing room for growth. Design & Everyday Use This collar combines strength with lightweight comfort, making it suitable for everyday wear without causing irritation. The vibrant blue color adds style, while the reflective detailing keeps both you and your dog visible during evening outings. Perfect for identification tags, daily walks, or training sessions.
